summary: US-842 completion gate passed for the single active Spexus component, default. Spexus current_context was read before the epic hierarchy and task context. The required dependency reports were present at the exact accepted paths, valid JSON, matched PERSONAL-EP-180, and reported succeeded status. Current source/test inspection plus a fresh npm run verify confirmed the fixed Sochi MVP profile, all required phase transitions, legal human action exposure, trick-winner mutation, integration coverage, accessibility, visual desktop evidence, localStorage compatibility, regression impact, and release readiness for this static local Vite frontend/domain app. No backend, live API, authentication, tenant scope, server route, server persistence, database migration, or intercepted-browser evidence applies.

requirements_coverage.evidence: src/domain/engine.ts, src/domain/rules.ts, src/domain/scoring.ts, src/domain/engine.test.ts, src/domain/scoring.test.ts, src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts, npm run verify
requirements_coverage.notes: Verified six-spades no mandatory whist, ten-level check behavior, half-whist availability, progressive all-pass scoring, and six-level reopening after all-pass under the fixed MVP profile.

requirements_coverage.evidence: src/domain/engine.ts, src/ui/render.ts, src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts, src/domain/engine.test.ts, src/ui/render.test.ts, npm run verify
requirements_coverage.notes: Verified bidding, all-pass, contract ordering, widow pickup, discard, whist, half-whist, pass, trick play, misere, deal settlement, next-deal transition, and bullet completion coverage.

requirements_coverage.evidence: src/domain/engine.ts, src/domain/engine.test.ts, src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts, npm run verify
requirements_coverage.notes: Verified third-card trick completion determines winner, updates trick counts, clears currentTrick, and assigns the winner as next lead or settlement actor on final trick.

acceptance_criteria_coverage.evidence: src/ui/render.ts, src/ui/render.test.ts, src/ui/controller.test.ts, src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1141/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1143/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1144/attempt-1.json, npm run verify
acceptance_criteria_coverage.notes: UI controls are projected from getLegalActions for human actors, AI/finished controls are suppressed, non-legal cards are disabled, and discard confirmation is only enabled for legal two-card discards.

acceptance_criteria_coverage.evidence: src/domain/engine.ts, src/domain/engine.test.ts, src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts, npm run verify
acceptance_criteria_coverage.notes: Deterministic integration and domain tests assert completed trick state mutation and next lead.

component_coverage.limitations: Spexus current_context lists only the default component for this project.
